title: Rolson 50571 5 m x 25 mm Tape Measure with Magnetic Tip
features: Nylon coated blade with two strong magnets on tip
Impact resistant plastic housing with rubber outer cover
Thumb operated lock with belt clip on reverse
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring them innovative products, all at the possible margins and this year is no different. To date, they have over 250 exciting and innovative products to whet their appetite, together with a host of new in store packaging and point of sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to their existing lines. They bring product combinations that bring originality. Rolson 50571 5 m x 25 mm Tape Measure with Magnetic Tip True zero end hook for accurate measuring of internal and external distances. TOUGH Impact resistant strong plastic housing with rubber outer cover. 5 m Long maximum measuring distance It has BEND RESISTANCE 25 mm coated tape blade ensures consistent standout of up to 2 m.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎5m x 25mm Nylon Tape with Magnetic Tip
